calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2005 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: MATTER ON FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. ACTION SETTLED PER STIP OF THE PARTIES, AS FOLLOWS:PLTF SHALL BE AWARDED REST OF PREMISES AT 2420 VAN NESS AVENUE, #19, SAN FRANCISCO CA. DEFT AGREES TO VACATE THE PREMISES BY MIDNIGHT, SATURDAY, MAY 7, 2005.SHOULD DEFT FAIL TO VACATE THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE THE DATE SPECIFIED , PLTF MAY, UPON EX PARTE APPLICATION TO THE COURT, HAVE JUDGEMNT FOR POSSESSION ENTERED AND MONEY JUDGMENT OF $5545.00. PLTF SHALL PROVIDE ANY PROSPECTIVE LANDLORDS WHO MAKE INQUIRY REGARDING DEFENDANT'S TENANCY WITH NEUTRAL REFERENCES ON BEHALF OF THE DEFT. THE PARTIES ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THE PLTF IS HOLDING SECURITY DEPOSITS AND LAST MONTH'S RENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.THE DEPOSITS AND INTEREST ARE FORFEITED BY DEFT. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN ATTY FEES.EACH PARTY RELEASES THE OTHER FROM ALL CLAIMS DEMANDS AND CAUSES OF ACTION, KNOWN OR UNKNOWN, PRESENT OR FUTURE, ARISING OUT OF DEFENDANT'S TENANCY AT THESE PREMISES.VACATE TRIAL DATE.PLTF IN PRO PER;DEFT IN PRO PER; JUDGE PRO TEM:TIELA CHALMERS; CLERK-BBSURRATT;NOT REPORTED.(DEPT. 218)
